description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in casual urban attire, featuring a short-sleeve collared polo shirt and fitted pants. He wears modern sneakers and sports a pair of large, reflective sunglasses, adding a contemporary touch to his appearance. The figure has a neatly groomed beard and short hair, with a confident, upright posture and arms relaxed at his sides. The clothing fits well, with subtle creases and realistic proportions, and the shoes have visible laces and textured soles. The overall look is clean and presentable, suitable for a city street, park, or neighborhood setting. No accessories or carried items are visible apart from the sunglasses.
description: A casually dressed adult male with a polo shirt, fitted pants, sneakers, and sunglasses, standing upright with a neat appearance. The figure has short hair, a beard, and a confident, relaxed posture.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full face, sunglasses, collared shirt, fitted pants, and sneakers with laces.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, beard, short hair, and the side seam of the clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, shirt, pants, and the heel detail of the sneakers.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, arm, and side of the outfit.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeve polo shirt and fitted pants with modern sneakers and sunglasses
attribute_hairstyle: short hair with neatly groomed beard
